outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: US Vows 'Most Intense Day of Strikes' as Oil Crashes 11% on Trump's 'War Ending Soon' Signal
outlets.summary: Reports Trump telling Republicans war could end 'very soon' while Pentagon confirms 5,000+ targets struck. Oil crashes 11-12%. Growing gap between US de-escalation signals and Israel's vow of 'many surprises.'

outlets.name: PBS
outlets.headline: The war in Iran has entered a second week. Here's where things stand
outlets.summary: Provides a comprehensive status update on the conflict as it enters its second week, covering military operations, diplomatic efforts, and humanitarian conditions.

outlets.name: MSNBC
outlets.headline: Oil Crashes as Trump Says War 'Pretty Much Complete' — Only 29% of Americans Approve of Strikes
outlets.summary: Highlights historically low public approval for the war (29%, Reuters/Ipsos). Reports on oil price crash after Trump's de-escalation signals while Iran's FM calls it 'Operation Epic Mistake.'

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: 5,000+ Iranian Targets Destroyed — Trump: War Will Be Over 'Very Soon.' 90% of Missile Launchers Eliminated
outlets.summary: Celebrates 5,000+ targets struck and 90% reduction in Iranian missile capability. Reports Trump saying war is 'very complete, pretty much.' Frames oil crash as market confidence in victory. ~140 US troops wounded.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Trump and Netanyahu face mounting questions about Iran endgame
outlets.summary: Reports on growing pressure on both leaders to articulate a clear exit strategy as the war extends into its second week with no ceasefire in sight.

outlets.name: Daily Wire
outlets.headline: Hezbollah Attacks NATO Base in Cyprus — Macron Talks Tough but Europe Still Won't Fight
outlets.summary: Uses the Akrotiri attack to argue Europe has been freeloading on US security. Criticizes European nations for condemning Iran but refusing to join military operations.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran FM Calls War 'Operation Epic Mistake' — Trump Says War Ending 'Very Soon' as Oil Crashes
outlets.summary: Araghchi brands US war 'Operation Epic Mistake.' Trump signals de-escalation while Netanyahu vows 'many surprises.' Oil crashes 11%. Iran using cluster munitions against Israeli civilians. 29% approval for strikes.

outlets.name: Reuters
outlets.headline: Bahrain Strikes and Turkey Intercept Mark Escalation as War Enters Second Week
outlets.summary: Reports on the widening geographic scope of the conflict with strikes in Bahrain and a Turkish military intercept signaling growing regional entanglement.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: UK Parliament Debates British Base Usage in Iran Conflict Amid Growing Domestic Opposition
outlets.summary: Covers heated parliamentary debate over whether British military bases should continue to be used for US-Israel operations against Iran.

outlets.name: France 24
outlets.headline: Macron: 'Attack on Cyprus Is Attack on Europe' — Hezbollah Drone Strike on RAF Akrotiri Shakes NATO
outlets.summary: Leads with the Akrotiri strike and Macron's declaration. Reports emergency NATO consultations and debates on whether Article 5 applies to the Cyprus attack.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF: Half of Iran's 300 Missiles at Israel Had Cluster Bomb Warheads — 2 Killed in Central Israel
outlets.summary: IDF assessment reveals scope of Iranian cluster munition use. Netanyahu vows 'many surprises' while Trump signals war ending soon. Growing gap between Israeli and US objectives. Oil crashes 11%.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Debunking Iranian Disinformation: Claims About Netanyahu Family Exposed as Fabrication
outlets.summary: Investigative report dismantling Iranian state media claims about the Netanyahu family, tracing the disinformation campaign to IRGC-linked social media accounts.

outlets.name: Ynet News
outlets.headline: 8 US Troops Dead, Hormuz Shut, Oil at $119 — War's Cost Mounts as Khamenei Dynasty Digs In
outlets.summary: Covers the widening toll of the conflict on coalition forces and the global economy. Reports on Israeli home front fatigue as the war enters its second week.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Tehran Vows 'Eye for Eye' After Residential Building Massacre; Drone Strike Targets Haifa Refinery
outlets.summary: Frames the 40 killed in eastern Tehran as deliberate targeting of civilians. Highlights Iran's drone attack on Haifa oil refinery and vows of proportional retaliation against energy infrastructure.

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: Resistance Axis Grows Stronger Under New Leadership; IRGC Claims Multiple Enemy Targets Destroyed
outlets.summary: Frames the leadership transition as strengthening the resistance axis and amplifies IRGC statements claiming successful strikes against US and Israeli military assets.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Saudi Civilians Pay Price of Alliance with Aggressors; Switzerland Exposes US-Israel War Crimes
outlets.summary: Uses the Al-Kharj strike to warn Gulf states against siding with the US-Israel coalition. Amplifies Swiss condemnation as vindication of Iran's legal position.
